/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/base_demo_cpp/base_demo_cpp_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/base_demo_cpp_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/base_demo_cpp/_base_demo_cpp_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/shu/ros2_ws/build/base_demo_cpp:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_generator_py.so libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so libbase_demo_cpp__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
